Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class OmniDataTransformItem

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.OmniDataTransformItem
public class OmniDataTransformItem extends Object

Java class for OmniDataTransformItem complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OmniDataTransformItem">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="defaultValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="disabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterDataType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ODTItemFilterDataType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterGroup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterOperator" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="formulaConverted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="formulaExpression" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="formulaResultPath" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="formulaSequence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="globalKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputObjectName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputObjectQuerySequence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="linkedFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="linkedObjectSequence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupByFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupObjectName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupReturnedFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationAttribute" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationGroup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationPattern" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationProcess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="migrationValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="omniDataTransformation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="omniDataTransformationId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outputCreationSequence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outputFieldFormat" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outputFieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outputObjectName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="requiredForUpsert" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="transformValuesMappings" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="upsertKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
